title: Ilavarasi
desc: Illavarasi, a kind and hard-working woman from a poor background, faces various trials and tribulations and works tirelessly to overcome them.

title: Arasi
desc: Conflicting ideals and moral dilemmas challenge Senthamizharase and Selvi while they confront intricate family bonds and societal demands.

title: Vaanampadi
desc: Two sisters,Thulasi and Manasi, face a fork in the road with impending difficulites when one of them chooses to marry the son of their father's enemy.

title: Ganapathiye Varuvai
desc: Delve into the interesting story of Lord Ganesha as he goes on an adventurous journey and grows up to become a revered deity.

title: Vaadi Rasathi
desc: Anjana Shankaran, an ordinary girl with extraordinary dreams aspires to become a District Collector and moreover, has the courage to claim the role of Chief Minister of Kerala one day.

title: Tenali Raman
desc: Tenali Raman, an advisor at the court of King Krishnadevaraya, uses his sharp presence of mind and wisdom to solve the difficult matters of the kingdom and its people daily.

title: Aladdin
desc: Aladdin, a poor thief, discovers a magical lamp containing a Genie. However, soon he realizes that Zafar, an evil sorcerer, also desires the lamp to rule over Baghdad.

title: Veettoda Mappillai
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: MRP
desc: A techie with weight problems gets married, but his wife meets with an accident and loses her memory. When she regains them, she does not recognise him and refuses to accept their marriage.

title: Crime World
desc: The narrator presents a dramatised re-enactment of cases which unveil the depth of some evil conspiracies in society.

title: Chellame
desc: The seemingly unshakeable bonds within a joint family start to decline as the allure of money causes its members drift apart.

title: Chithi
desc: Kaveri's mother loses her life after falling into a river. As a result, Kaveri, who longs for her affection, forces her father to accept a different woman.
